summary: Iteration 7 retest of the one-line fix on StoreIssuePage.jsx line 164-167. ALL PASS. Backend: 86/86 pytest green (no changes). Frontend Playwright: (1) issue-item-0 Tab on 'ba' -> 'Baja Plate 10mm' PASS; (2) issue-item-0 Enter on 'ba' -> 'Baja Plate 10mm' PASS; (3) SUBMIT INTEGRITY: filled item='ba'+Tab, qty=1, so='SO-'+Tab (-> SO-2026-004, the actual first-alphabetical match; spec's 'SO-2026-001' was an incorrect expectation — autocomplete picks first array match), taker='Test QA', clicked submit -> toast '1 pengeluaran berhasil disimpan' -> GET /api/store/issuances top record confirmed item_name='Baja Plate 10mm', so_number='SO-2026-004', taker_name='Test QA', issue_date=today. (4) Regression: ig-stock-0 default UNCHECKED PASS; del-destination Tab autocompletes 'TEST_' -> full name PASS; input-vendor Tab autocompletes 'CV' -> full name PASS. The iter-6 regression is fully resolved; no new issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: Note: the SO Tab autocomplete resolves to 'SO-2026-004' rather than 'SO-2026-001' because the SO array from /api/sales-orders is ordered with 004 first (likely created-desc). This is not a bug — tryAutocomplete correctly returns the first prefix-match. If a specific SO ordering is required for UX, sort sos by so_no ascending in StoreIssuePage.jsx line 37-39 before mapping to soOptions.

TEST_ seed data (TEST_Consumed_*, TEST_SO, TEST_Taker) from prior iterations still visible in Pengeluaran Terakhir — cleanup fixture in backend_test.py only runs on transactions, not issuances. Non-blocking for testing but worth periodic cleanup.
seed_data_creation: Test QA issuance created (1x Baja Plate 10mm, SO-2026-004, taker='Test QA', date=today). Consumed 1 unit of Baja Plate 10mm stock.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iter-6 issues resolved. Fix at StoreIssuePage.jsx line 164-167 is correctly chaining tryAutocomplete(stockOptions) before onRowKeyDown. If future SO ordering tests expect a specific SO, either adjust expectation or sort soOptions in the component.
rca of the issue: N/A — verification-only iteration. The iter-6 fix (adding tryAutocomplete wrapper on item_name onKeyDown) works as designed.
